tests.name: CountAnswer contradiction: count exceeds value
tests.description: count_answer A=0 but 2 A's already found

tests.name: CountAnswer contradiction: count+remaining < value
tests.description: count_answer A=2 but all others answered non-A, 0 remaining

tests.name: CountVowel contradiction: count exceeds value
tests.description: count_vowel=0 but A and E already found

tests.name: CountConsonant contradiction: count+remaining too low
tests.description: count_consonant=3 but only 1 consonant found, 1 remaining → 1+1=2 < 3

tests.name: CountAnswerBefore contradiction: count exceeds value in range
tests.description: count_answer_before A <Q3 = 0, but Q1=A → count=1 > 0

tests.name: AnswerOf contradiction: target has different answer
tests.description: answer_of Q2, answered A→B, but Q2=C

tests.name: LetterDist contradiction: distance doesn't match
tests.description: letter_dist Q2, answered A (value=0). Q2=D. |0-3|=3 ≠ 0

tests.name: NoOtherHasAnswer contradiction: answer appears twice
SameAs contradiction: target has different answer
tests.description: same_as answered D (value=2 → Q3). Q3=B ≠ D

tests.name: FirstWith contradiction: position has wrong answer
tests.description: first_with A, answered B (→ Q2). Q2=C ≠ A

tests.name: FirstWith contradiction: earlier match exists
tests.description: first_with A answered C (→ Q3). But Q1=A before Q3

tests.name: FirstWith None contradiction: match exists
tests.description: first_with A answered None, but Q2=A exists

tests.name: LastWith contradiction: later match exists
tests.description: last_with A answered A (→ Q1). But Q4=A after Q1

tests.name: LastWith None contradiction: match exists
tests.description: last_with A answered None. But Q1=A exists

tests.name: ClosestAfter contradiction: earlier match exists
tests.description: closest_after A (>Q1), answered C (→ Q3). But Q2=A before Q3

tests.name: ClosestBefore contradiction: position has wrong answer
tests.description: closest_before A (<Q4), answered B (→ Q2). Q2=C ≠ A

tests.name: ClosestBefore contradiction: later match exists in range
tests.description: closest_before A (<Q4), answered A (→ Q1). But Q3=A is closer (between Q1 and Q4)

tests.name: PrevSame fallback: target answer mismatch (all answered)
tests.description: prev_same answered B, claims Q1. Q1=A ≠ B. All answered.

tests.name: NextSame fallback: no match at position (all answered)
tests.description: next_same answered B, claims Q3. Q3=C ≠ B. All answered.

tests.name: ConsecIdent fallback: pair mismatch (all answered)
tests.description: consec_ident answered A, claims Q1&Q2. Q1=C, Q2=D differ. All answered.

tests.name: OnlySame fallback: no unique match (all answered)
tests.description: only_same answered A (→ Q1). Q1=B, but Q3=A too (2 matches). All answered.

tests.name: OnlyOdd fallback: no odd match (all answered)
tests.description: only_odd A answered B (→ Q2, even). All answered. Q2 is even → invalid.

tests.name: Count saturation: count met, eliminate remaining matches
tests.description: count_answer A=1, Q2=A found. Eliminate A from Q3,Q4.

tests.name: Count saturation: remaining must all match
tests.description: count_answer A=3, Q2=A,Q3=A. count=2, 1 remaining. 2+1=3. Q4 must be A → eliminate B.

tests.name: Count saturation: skips questions that can't match (all matching options eliminated)
tests.description: count_answer A=1, Q2=A. Q3 has A eliminated. Q4 is unknown. Eliminate A from Q4 only.

tests.name: CountVowel saturation: vowel count met
tests.description: count_vowel=1, Q2=A (vowel). Eliminate vowels (A,E) from Q3,Q4.

tests.name: Forced: only 1 option remaining
Forced: AnswerOf forward (target known)
tests.description: answer_of Q2, Q2=B. Option A maps to B → force A.

tests.name: Forced: AnswerOf reverse
tests.description: Q2=answer_of Q1, answered A. Option A maps to C → Q1=C.

tests.name: Forced: LetterDist only 1 valid option after eliminations
tests.description: letter_dist Q2, only A remains. Q2=B. |A-B|=1, value=3. Doesn't match but forced anyway (only option).

tests.name: Forced: counting rule all in range answered
tests.description: count_answer A=2, Q2=A,Q3=B,Q4=A. count=2. Eliminate options ≠ 2, then force.

tests.name: FirstWith elimination: position has wrong answer
FirstWith elimination: answer eliminated from target
tests.description: first_with C, option A → Q2. C eliminated from Q2.

tests.name: FirstWith elimination: earlier match exists
tests.description: first_with A, option B → Q2. But Q1=A is first.

tests.name: FirstWith None elimination: match exists
LastWith elimination: later match exists
tests.description: last_with A, option A → Q1. But Q4=A is later.

tests.name: LastWith elimination: answer eliminated from target
tests.description: last_with C, option A → Q1. C eliminated from Q1.

tests.name: LastWith None elimination: match exists
ClosestAfter elimination: position out of range
tests.description: closest_after A (>Q2), option A → Q1. Q1 before Q2.

tests.name: ClosestAfter elimination: position out of range (before afterIndex)
tests.description: closest_after A (>Q1), option A → Q1 (index 0). scanStart=1, 0 < 1 → out of range.

tests.name: ClosestBefore elimination: position out of range
tests.description: closest_before A (<Q2), option C → Q3 (index 2). 2 >= beforeIndex=1.

tests.name: ClosestBefore None elimination: match exists in range
tests.description: closest_before A (<Q3), option None. But Q1=A exists.

tests.name: AnswerOf elimination: claimed letter eliminated from target
tests.description: answer_of Q2. Option A maps to B. B eliminated from Q2.

tests.name: AnswerOf elimination: target answered wrong → force (only 1 option matches)
tests.description: answer_of Q2, Q2=C. Only option C maps to C → force C.

tests.name: LetterDist elimination: distance doesn't match
tests.description: letter_dist Q2, Q2=C. Option A: |A-C|=2, value=3. Mismatch.

tests.name: PrevSame elimination: position after self
PrevSame elimination: closer match exists
tests.description: prev_same Q5, option B → Q1. Q4=B is closer.

tests.name: PrevSame elimination: position equals self
tests.description: prev_same Q3, option C → Q3 (self). Can't be self.

tests.name: NextSame elimination: position before self
tests.description: next_same Q1, option B → Q1 (index 0). 0 ≤ 0.

tests.name: NextSame elimination: closer match exists
tests.description: next_same Q1, option D → Q4. Q2=D is closer.

tests.name: NextSame elimination: position >= n
tests.description: next_same Q1, option E → Q5 (index 4). But n=4.

tests.name: OnlySame elimination: self-reference
ConsecIdent elimination: pair has different answers
tests.description: consec_ident, option A → Q1&Q2 pair. Q1=A, Q2=B differ.

tests.name: ConsecIdent None elimination: pair exists
tests.description: consec_ident, option B is None. But Q1=A, Q2=A form a pair.

tests.name: OnlyOdd elimination: even position
tests.description: only_odd A, option B → Q2 (index 1, 1-indexed=2, even).

tests.name: OnlyOdd elimination: target has wrong answer
tests.description: only_odd A, option A → Q1 (odd). Q1=B ≠ A.

tests.name: OnlyOdd elimination: answer eliminated from target
tests.description: only_odd A, option A → Q1 (odd). A eliminated from Q1.

tests.name: OnlyOdd None elimination: odd match exists
tests.description: only_odd A, option C is None. But Q1=A (Q1 is odd).

tests.name: CountAnswer elimination: count exceeds option value
tests.description: count_answer A, option C=0. Q2=A, Q3=A → count=2 > 0.

tests.name: CountAnswer elimination: count+remaining < option value
tests.description: count_answer A, option A=3. Q2=B, Q3=C. count=0, remaining=1. 0+1=1 < 3.

tests.name: CountAnswerBefore elimination: impossible count → force
tests.description: count_answer_before A (<Q3). Q1=B, Q2=B → 0 A's. Only option C=0 matches → force.

tests.name: LetterDist elimination: distance doesn't match
tests.description: letter_dist Q2, Q2=C. Option A: |A-C|=2, value=3. 2≠3.

tests.name: Vowel/consonant cross: eliminate impossible vowel count
tests.description: count_vowel=B (value 1), count_consonant exists. n=4. consonant must be 3. If consonant has no option for 3, eliminate matching vowel options.

tests.name: No action: blank state with only answer_is_self
CountAnswerAfter contradiction: count exceeds in after range
tests.description: count_answer_after A (>Q1), answered C (value=0). But Q3=A and Q4=A → count=2 > 0

tests.name: ClosestAfter None contradiction: answered None but match exists after index
tests.description: closest_after A (>Q1), answered E (None). But Q3=A exists after Q1

tests.name: ClosestBefore None contradiction: answered None but match exists before index
tests.description: closest_before A (<Q4), answered E (None). But Q2=A exists before Q4

tests.name: CountConsonant saturation: consonant count met, eliminate remaining consonants
tests.description: count_consonant=2. Q1=A(vowel). Q2=B, Q3=D → 2 consonants. Eliminate consonants from Q4.

tests.name: CountAnswerAfter saturation: partial range, count met
tests.description: count_answer_after A (>Q1)=1, Q3=A. Eliminate A from Q4.

tests.name: Count saturation: remaining=0 and count matches, no action needed
tests.description: count_answer A=2, Q2=A,Q3=A,Q4=B. count=2, remaining=0. 2==2, valid.

tests.name: Forced: LetterDist with 2+ options but only 1 satisfies distance
tests.description: letter_dist Q2, Q2=D. Options: A=3, B=1, C=0, D=1, E=2. |A-D|=3 matches A. |B-D|=2!=1. |C-D|=1!=0. |D-D|=0!=1. |E-D|=1!=2. Only A works.

tests.name: Forced: SameAs reverse (another SameAs references this one)
tests.description: Q2=same_answer_as, answered C. Option C value=0 (→Q1). So Q1 must be C.

tests.name: Forced: only 1 option remaining after multiple eliminations
tests.description: Q2 has A,B,C,D eliminated, only E remains.

tests.name: ClosestAfter elimination: position has wrong answer
tests.description: closest_after A (>Q1), option B → Q3 (index 2). Q3=C ≠ A.

tests.name: ClosestAfter elimination: answer eliminated from target position
tests.description: closest_after A (>Q1), option A → Q2 (index 1). A eliminated from Q2.

tests.name: ClosestBefore elimination: closer match exists in range
tests.description: closest_before A (<Q5), option A → Q1 (index 0). Q3=A is closer to Q5 than Q1.

tests.name: ClosestBefore elimination: answer eliminated from target position
tests.description: closest_before A (<Q4), option A → Q1 (index 0). A eliminated from Q1.

tests.name: LastWith elimination: position has wrong answer
tests.description: last_with A, option C → Q3 (index 2). Q3=B ≠ A.

tests.name: FirstWith elimination: position out of range (>= n)
tests.description: first_with A, option D → index 5. But n=4, so 5 >= 4 → out of range.

tests.name: LetterDist elimination: multiple options, only eliminate mismatches
tests.description: letter_dist Q2, Q2=C. A: |0-2|=2, opt=3 → mismatch (elim). B: |1-2|=1, opt=1 → ok. Engine hits A first.

tests.name: PrevSame elimination: target answered with different letter (all answered)
tests.description: prev_same Q3, answered B. Option B → Q2 (index 1). Q2=D, Q3=B. D≠B. All answered → evaluate fallback catches it.

tests.name: NextSame contradiction: target answered with different letter (all answered)
tests.description: next_same Q1, answered C. Option C → Q3 (index 2). Q3=A ≠ C. All answered → evaluate fallback.

tests.name: OnlySame elimination: target answered with different letter (both answered)
tests.description: only_same Q2, answered D. Option D → Q1 (index 0). Q1=A, Q2=D. A ≠ D. But Q2 is answered and OnlySame self-ref check: v=0 ≠ qi=1, so not self. Then check OnlySame with all answered: evaluate checks if exactly 1 other Q matches Q2's answer.

tests.name: Vowel/consonant cross: consonant option has no vowel complement
tests.description: n=4. Q1=count_vowel options [0,1,2,3,5]. Q2=count_consonant options [0,1,2,3,4]. Q2 option A=0 consonants → needs 4 vowels. Q1 has no 4 option → eliminate Q2 A.

tests.name: Vowel/consonant cross: both answered consistently, no action
tests.description: n=4. Q1=count_vowel=B (1 vowel). n-1=3 consonants. Q2=count_consonant has option D=3. Both consistent.

tests.name: Vowel/consonant cross: vowel answered, eliminate consonant with no complement
tests.description: n=4. Q1=count_vowel=A (0 vowels). n-0=4 consonants needed. Q2=count_consonant has no 4 option → eliminate Q1 option A.

tests.name: Boundary: puzzle with exactly 2 questions, saturation eliminates
tests.description: count_answer A=0. Q1=B (answered). Q2 unknown. count=0, remaining=1 (Q2). count==0 → eliminate A from Q2.

tests.name: Boundary: question at index 0 with closest_after positional rule
tests.description: Q1=closest_after A (>Q1, afterIndex=0). Option A → Q2 (index 1). Q2=B ≠ A.

tests.name: Boundary: question at last index with PrevSame
tests.description: Q4 (last) has prev_same. Option A → Q3 (index 2). Q3=B, Q4 unanswered. No contradiction (Q4 not answered). Elim: v=2 < qi=3 (ok). Closer match check: j=2 already is target. No closer match in (2,3). But Q3=B and LETTERS[oi=0]='A'. Q3≠A so no closer match found. Passes. Option B → Q1 (index 0). v=0 < qi=3 ok. Closer match j in (0..3): Q2 not answered, Q3=B. LETTERS[oi=1]='B'. Q3=B and j=2 > v=0 → closer match exists → eliminate B.

tests.name: Boundary: count saturation with count=0 (eliminate all matching)
tests.description: count_answer A=0. No A's should exist. Q2,Q3 unknown → eliminate A from both. First hit: Q2 option A.

tests.name: Boundary: FirstWith where all positions have the answer → first position wins
tests.description: first_with A, Q1=A, Q2=A, Q3=A. First is Q1 (index 0). Option A maps to Q1 → force A.

tests.name: Boundary: LastWith where multiple positions have answer → last wins
tests.description: last_with A. Q1=A, Q3=A. Last A is Q3 (index 2). Option A → Q1 (index 0). Closer match Q3 exists → eliminate A.

tests.name: Boundary: ConsecIdent with pair at boundary (last two, all answered)
tests.description: consec_ident Q4, answered C → pair at index 2 (Q3&Q4). Q3=A, Q4=B → different. All answered → evaluate fallback.

tests.name: No action: consistent state, no deductions possible
No action: all questions answered correctly (no contradictions)
tests.description: count_answer A=2. Q2=A, Q3=A, Q4=B. count=2, matches. All answered.

tests.name: No action: correctly answered LetterDist (all answered)
tests.description: letter_dist Q2, Q1=A, Q2=C. |A-C|=2, option A value=2. Correct, no contradiction.

tests.name: No action: correctly answered first_with (all answered)
tests.description: first_with A, answered A (→ Q1). Q1=A. No earlier match. Correct.

tests.name: ClosestAfter None elimination: match exists after index
tests.description: closest_after A (>Q1), option C is None. But Q3=A exists after Q1.

tests.name: ClosestBefore None elimination: match exists before index
tests.description: closest_before A (<Q4), option C is None. But Q1=A exists before Q4.

tests.name: LastWith elimination: answer eliminated from target
tests.description: last_with A, option C → Q3 (index 2). A eliminated from Q3.

tests.name: FirstWith elimination: answer eliminated from target
tests.description: first_with A, option B → Q2 (index 1). A eliminated from Q2.

tests.name: NoOtherHasAnswer contradiction: same answer appears in 3 questions
tests.description: unique_answer Q1=A. Q2=A, Q3=A. count=3 > 1.

tests.name: SameAs elimination: self-reference in option value
tests.description: same_as Q2 (qi=1), unanswered. Option B value=1 (self). Can't point to self → eliminate B.

tests.name: CountAnswerAfter elimination: count+remaining too low for option
tests.description: count_answer_after A (>Q1). Q3=B, Q4=C. count=0, remaining=0. Only option C=0 matches.

tests.name: Forced: AnswerOf when only 1 option maps to target (not first option)
tests.description: answer_of Q2, Q2=D. Options map: A→B, B→A, C→D, D→C, E→E. Only C maps to D → force C.

tests.name: ClosestAfter elimination: earlier match makes option impossible
tests.description: closest_after A (>Q1), option B → Q3 (index 2). But Q2=A (index 1) is closer. Eliminate B first.

tests.name: OnlyOdd elimination: even-indexed position (4th question)
tests.description: only_odd A, option D → index 3 (Q4). (3+1)%2=0 (even) → eliminate D.

tests.name: ConsecIdent elimination: None option but pair exists (partial state)
tests.description: consec_ident Q3. Q1=C, Q2=C form a pair. Option C is None → eliminate (pair exists). Option C checked before D.

tests.name: Forced: counting rule with count_answer_before all answered
tests.description: count_answer_before A (<Q3). Q1=A, Q2=B → 1 A before Q3. Only option B=1 matches → force B.

tests.name: Saturation: count_answer remaining must match, eliminate non-matching
tests.description: count_answer B=2. Q1=A (value=2, not a B). Q2=B, Q3=C. count=1 (Q2), remaining=1 (Q4). 1+1=2==value → Q4 must be B → eliminate A from Q4.

tests.name: Boundary: ClosestBefore with beforeIndex=1 (only Q1 in range)
tests.description: closest_before A (<Q2, beforeIndex=1). Range is [0,1). Only Q1 (index 0). Option B → Q1 (index 0). Q1=B ≠ A.

tests.name: Boundary: FirstWith where target is Q1 (index 0, answer matches)
tests.description: first_with A, option A → Q1 (index 0). Q1=A. Correct, no earlier match possible. No elimination for option A.

tests.section: === Partial-state contradictions (JS-only; Rust uses evaluate fallback for these) ===

tests.name: PrevSame partial contradiction: target answered differently
tests.description: Q3=prev_same answered B, claims Q1. Q1=A ≠ B. Q2 unknown. Should contradict without needing all answered.

tests.name: NextSame partial contradiction: target answered differently
tests.description: Q1=next_same answered C, option C claims Q3 (index 2). Q3=A ≠ C. Q2 unknown.

tests.name: OnlySame partial contradiction: target answered differently
tests.description: Q2=only_same answered C, claims Q3. Q3=A ≠ C. Q1 unknown.

tests.name: ConsecIdent partial contradiction: pair has different answers
tests.description: Q4=consec_ident answered A, claims Q1&Q2 pair. Q1=C, Q2=D. Q3 unknown.

tests.name: PrevSame partial contradiction: position at self
tests.description: Q2=prev_same answered C, option C value=1 (Q2 itself). Self-reference. Q1 unknown.
